html.body: [-:-] Given input is not a valid SBGN-ML file. [submap:entityVertex_453279_2739] Submaps are not supported. [submap:entityVertex_1912422_2585] Submaps are not supported. [submap:entityVertex_170834_2681] Submaps are not supported. [process-arcs:reactionVertex_1912391_127] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_157632_12] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_1852623_29] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_157353_16] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_1912388_33] Product lines should be reversed [SquareCompartment:compartmentVertex_70101_6] CellDesigner requires thickness to be at least: 2.5 [SquareCompartment:compartmentVertex_70101_7] CellDesigner requires thickness to be at least: 2.5 [SquareCompartment:compartmentVertex_7660_22] CellDesigner requires thickness to be at least: 2.5
